TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_José_Eduardo_dos_Santos, title = José_Eduardo_dos_Santos, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/José_Eduardo_dos_Santos} }

S.FORM: == José Eduardo dos Santos == ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 8, José Eduardo dos Santos, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1942) mrhuw Angola ta' misuw hya' ga José Eduardo dos Santos, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1979 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Ana Paula dos Santos ga, kneril ni José Eduardo dos Santos. José Eduardo dos Santos ga, la'iy ni Jacinta José Paulino. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== José Eduardo dos Santos == ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 8, José Eduardo dos Santos, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1942) mrhuw Angola ta' misuw hya' ga José Eduardo dos Santos, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1979 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Ana Paula dos Santos ga, kneril ni José Eduardo dos Santos. José Eduardo dos Santos ga, la'iy ni Jacinta José Paulino. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == *os~ɕ* e*uar*o *os~ɕ s~ɕantos~ɕ == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *os~ɕ* e*uar*o *os~ɕ s~ɕantos~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw aŋola taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *os~ɕ* e*uar*o *os~ɕ s~ɕantos~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja ana paula *os~ɕ s~ɕantos~ɕ ɣa, kneril ni *os~ɕ* e*uar*o *os~ɕ s~ɕantos~ɕ. *os~ɕ* e*uar*o *os~ɕ s~ɕantos~ɕ ɣa, laʔij ni *aʦ~ʨinta *os~ɕ* paulino. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
